chapter_title: Request for access to medical report
snippet: An employee or a representative of the employee, such as a legal or union representative, may request access to a medical report under the Freedom of Information Act 1982 or the Health Records Act 2001. A request under the Freedom of Information Act 1982 may be made to the school or the Department. Information regarding making a request under the Freedom of Information process is available at Freedom of Information . A request made under the Health Records Act 2001 should be referred to the medical practitioner who conducted the medical assessment, who may prepare a report and charge a suitable fee for this. Comprehensive information concerning the department's privacy policy is available at Department of Education privacy policy External Link .
